text:
The Congo Gold Vein (, Kongo Kinmyaku) is a gold mine and/or an archaeological site. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 1, Chapter 7 

Background

At some point, Ging Freecss excavated the Congo Gold Vein. 

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

In a flashback involving Kite and a younger Gon, Kite informs the boy that one of Ging's achievements was the excavation of the Congo Gold Vein. 

Trivia

The place could be a reference to the Congo region located in Central Africa, famously the Democratic Republic of the Congo and the Republic of the Congo (both with gold mineral reserves).
The name of the location is transliterated as "Kongo gold vein" in Crunchyroll's version/translation. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 76 (2011) [20:52.05-58.50 min.] 

Anime and Manga Differences

In the 1999 anime adaptation, the Congo Gold Vein is mentioned by Satotz, Hunter × Hunter - Episode 31 (1999) not Kite.
In the 2011 anime adaptation, the Congo Gold Vein is only mentioned much later in the story due to the anime differences in how Gon and Kite met.
